creator: noah.bergbauer@tum.de
text:
I'm running FreeBSD 10.3 and some change during the last 300 days apparently broke grub2-bhyve. A clean build (I tested gcc48, gcc49, gcc5, gcc6 both from the port poudriere and manually from git) instantly segfaults - I can't even display --help.

I restored the binary from an old backup and that works just fine.

gdb complains about dwarf versions and doesn't show any symbols so I'm not sure how to debug this.
